name: Brownies (Satterley)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the oil, vanilla, vinegar, and cold water.
2. Add the baking soda and mix well.
3. Beat in the sugar, cocoa powder, and salt.
4. Finally, fold in the flour until all ingredients are well blended.
5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
7. When cool, cut into squares.
